articles.title: Binance To Ban Litecoin Transactions With MimbleWimble Upgrade
articles.description: The world’s biggest crypto exchange by volume, Binance, published blog post this morning saying they are not going to support the MimbleWimble Extensions Block (MWEB) feature for Litecoin (LTC) deposits and withdrawals. They cited worries about security as the main reason for this decision. Binance has delisted many other coins in the past due to […]

articles.title: Ethereum Flash Crash Sends Price Under $950 on Uniswap
articles.description: ETH has lost 20% of its value over the last day, but the price sank even further on Uniswap overnight due to a huge whale sale.

articles.title: Ethereum price flash crashes to $950 on Uniswap as whale dumps 93K ETH
articles.description: ETH managed a sharp rebound after falling to $950. But the ETH/USD bearish continuation setup could have it revisit it.

articles.title: Binance warns against use of litecoin’s Mimblewimble privacy feature
articles.description: The crypto exchange won't accept litecoin transactions using MimbleWimble Extension Blocks (MWEB).

articles.title: Celsius Network Suspends All Withdrawals with Immediate Effect
articles.description: Lending platform Celsius, which is rumored to be suffering from an acute liquidity crisis, suspended all customer withdrawals earlier today.

articles.title: Nexo offers to buy crypto assets from beleaguered rival Celsius
articles.description: The crypto lending firm wants to buy assets from beleaguered rival Celsius, claiming it's in a healthy position to do so.

articles.title: Terra in May, Celsius in June? Why the heat is on after withdrawals halt, $200M to FTX
articles.description: There’s no easy way to say this, but current crypto-market conditions can only be described as ‘extreme.’ In fact, ongoing corrections saw the price of Ether and other cryptocurrencies tumble, with many seeing significant liquidations within the market. Implications of a further fall could see nearly $500 million of on-chain collateral facing liquidation. The stETH/ETH pool […]

articles.title: Celsius exodus: $320M in crypto sent to FTX, user withdrawals paused
articles.description: Celsius has been moving more than a quarter of a billion dollars worth of funds from Aave into the FTX exchange for reasons not specified, in addition to suspending withdrawals for users.
